episodes.title: You’re Not Immune to Cults. Here’s Why.
episodes.description:
You’re not immune to cults—and neither am I.
This video breaks down the psychology of cults, explaining how ordinary people get pulled into high-control groups through charisma, crisis, and certainty.

Most people think cults only affect the weak or gullible. That’s not true. Using real examples like Jonestown and Heaven’s Gate, along with neuroscience and psychology, this video shows how social bonding, uncertainty, and authority shape human behavior—and why anyone can be influenced under the right conditions.

If you’ve ever wondered:

How cults form
Why intelligent people join cults
How charismatic leaders gain control
Or how to protect yourself from manipulation

This video will change how you think about belief, influence, and certainty.

🧠 What You’ll Learn
The 3-part formula behind every cult: charisma, crisis, and certainty
The neuroscience of trust, dopamine, and uncertainty
Why uncertainty feels like a threat in the brain
How love bombing and identity shifts actually work
The difference between healthy communities and high-control groups
Why modern culture (social media, politics, wellness trends) creates cult-like dynamics

⏱️ Chapters
00:00  You’re Not Immune
00:37  The 3 Ingredients: Charisma, Crisis, Certainty
01:01  The Power of Charisma (How Leaders Pull You In)
03:47  The Church Pipeline: When Faith Becomes Control
07:45    The Neuroscience of Trust (Oxytocin & Dopamine)
10:01  Crisis: The Moment You’re Most Vulnerable
13:45  Love Bombing & Belonging
14:21 Why Crisis Creates Dependency
20:55  The Modern Crisis (Your Phone Is Fueling This)
21:53  Certainty: The Most Addictive Force
24:55 When Doubt Becomes “Wrong”
25:57  How Control Systems Lock You In
29:58  The Rise of Modern Cults (Wellness, Politics, Influence)
31:21  The Truth About “Solid Ground”
35:33  The Question You Should Be Asking
